Matt Vickers MP
MP for Stockton West
Volunteer

Volunteer for Matt in your local area!

  • Tweet

In only 5 years, Stockton has seen unprecedented levels of investment, progress and success - and we need to spread the word of our achievements!

The Stockton West constituency covers the wards of Fairfield, Middleton St.George, Hurworth, Northern Parishes, Bishopsgarth, Elmtree, Thornaby (Village), Ingleby Barwick, Southern Villages, Hartburn, Yarm and Eaglescliffe.

👈 My team and I are always out delivering leaflets, attending campaign days and knocking on doors. Sign up using the form to the left if you can lend a hand!

Thank you for your support so we can continue to transform our local area.

Sign up to volunteer

I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me:
There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy.
In which of these ways can you help us?
The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Matt Vickers MP for Stockton South
